gateDecisions.AUTO_PROCEED: Routine local action — no human needed
gateDecisions.NEEDS_HUMAN_APPROVAL: Approval gate detected — wait for Junya
gateDecisions.SNAPSHOT_REQUIRED: Provider failed — compact snapshot generated for next agent
gateDecisions.BLOCKED_DANGEROUS_ACTION: Sensitive data or destructive operation — blocked
gateDecisions.BLOCKED_CONTEXT_OVERLOAD: Context too large — use snapshot only, shouldReadFullLog:false
